condition.description: Defines a condition that determines when the IAM binding is applied, specified using a title, expression, and optional description.

env_id.description: Unique identifier for the Apigee environment to which the IAM binding will be applied.

members.description: List of IAM members to bind to the specified role in the Apigee environment; must follow the format for IAM member types (e.g., user:email, serviceAccount:email, group:email).

org_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Apigee organization associated with the IAM binding.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to be assigned to members in the Apigee environment. Must be a predefined IAM role.
